title: HealthTrack EMR System
description: A full-stack electronic medical record platform with role-based dashboards for doctors, patients, and receptionists. Includes appointment scheduling, invoice management, and secure authentication.

title: RideLink Carpooling Platform
description: A real-time carpooling platform connecting drivers and passengers for daily commutes. Features trip scheduling, route matching, and driver ratings.

title: Spotify Lyrics Web App
description: A web app that syncs Spotify playback with real-time lyrics using the Spotify API. Designed for a clean, distraction-free experience.

title: Ticketing System for Car Stations
description: A web-based ticketing and route management system for car stations. Automates ticket issuance, validation, and tracking for better efficiency.

title: Developer Portfolio
description: A responsive personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact details. Features smooth animations, dark mode, and custom design components.
